悪いな。毎回毎回、大穴で見つかった武器を買い取りに<br>前線基地まで来てもらっ:
Sorry to have you come all the way to the Frontline Base every time
to buy the weapons we find in the Abyss.
この辺りは治安も悪いから、大変だろ？: It's not exactly safe around here, so it must be tough, right?
いえいえ。危険を冒すだけの価値のあるお宝と巡り合えますから。<br>毎度ご贔屓に:
Not at all. I come across treasures worth the risk. Thank you as
always for your business.
して、今回の買取商品はどちらに？: So, where are the goods for purchase this time?
ああ、あそこに置いてある箱の中に入っている。: Ah, they're in that box over there.
綺麗なものもあるが、折れたり曲がったりしちまってるものも多い。<br>正直、玉石:
There are some nice pieces, but many are broken or bent. Honestly,
it's a mixed bag.
どれぐらいの価値があるか、確認してみてくれ。: Take a look and see how much they're worth.
わかりました。<br>ではエルミア、頼んだよ。: Got it. Alright, Elmia, I'm counting on you.
ん……？ 彼女は、前回まではいなかったな。<br>新人か？: Hm...? She wasn't here last time. New recruit?
ええ。<br>つい先日、私が勤める貿易商社で雇った用心棒ですよ。:
Yes. She's a bodyguard we hired just the other day at the trading
company I work for.
ほう。貴重品の運搬は危険な旅だ。<br>そうとう腕の立つ用心棒を雇ったんだろうな:
Oh. Transporting valuables is dangerous work. You must have hired a
pretty capable bodyguard.
もちろん。かなりの凄腕です。<br>それと便利な特技を持っておりまして……: Of course. She's extremely skilled. And she has a useful special skill...
この弓は……意匠だけ凝っているが大した価値はなかろう。: This bow... it's elaborately designed, but probably not worth much.
こちらの槍は……少々欠けているが、価値としては申し分ない。<br>研ぎなおせば、:
This spear... it's slightly chipped, but its value is fine. If you sharpen
it, it should be usable in actual combat.
この杖は……かなりの値打ちものだ。<br>大穴ではこんなものも手に入れられるのか:
This staff... it's quite valuable. So you can get things like this from
the Abyss...
エルミア……だったか。<br>お前、武器の鑑定ができるのか。: Elmia, right? You can appraise weapons?
ああ。武器には昔から縁があったからね。: Yeah. I've always been involved with weapons.
ほう。おもしろそうな話だな。<br>聞かせてくれよ。: Oh? That sounds interesting. Go ahead, tell me.
かまわないが……申し訳ないが、まったく面白くはないぞ。: I do not mind, but... sorry, it is not interesting at all.
私はエルドラーナ出身で、元々はそこで倉庫番をしていたんだ。: I'm from Eldorana. I used to work there as a warehouse keeper.
倉庫番とはいっても、平和な街だったからあまり<br>やることがなくてな。:
Even though I was a warehouse keeper, it was a peaceful town, so
there wasn't much to do.
空いた時間に荷物整理なんかを手伝っているうちに、<br>武器の鑑定眼を磨くことが:
In my free time, I helped organize shipments and stuff, and that's how
I honed my weapon appraisal skills.
本業には劣るが、値打ちのあるものがどれなのかぐらいは<br>簡単に見分けられる。:
It's not as good as a pro's, but I can easily spot valuable items,
though it's mostly limited to weapons.
へえ、なるほどな。空いた時間を自分のスキルアップに使うなんて、<br>やるじゃな:
Wow, I see. Using your free time to improve your skills? That's pretty
impressive.
どうだ？ まったく面白みのない退屈な話だっただろ？: See? A thoroughly boring tale, was it not?
ん？ 別にそんなことはなかったぞ。<br>もっと聞きたいぐらいだ。: Huh? Not at all. I'd like to hear more, actually.
俺がやったことがない仕事の話だからな。<br>新鮮だった。でもなあ……: It's about a job I've never done, so it was fresh. But...
少し気になったんだが、どうして商人の用心棒になったんだ？:
Just wondering, Elmia, but why did you become a merchant's
bodyguard?
エルミアが働いていた倉庫は平和だったんだろ？<br>逆に前線基地の採掘品の護衛は:
Elmia, the warehouse where you worked was peaceful, right? But
guarding the excavated goods at the Frontline Base is a constant danger.
財宝目当ての盗賊団たちに目を付けられるだろうし、<br>大穴付近にはモンスターも:
You'd get targeted by bandit gangs after the treasure, and there are
many monsters near the Abyss.
わざわざ安全な仕事を捨ててまでやるような、<br>仕事とは思えんが。: I can't imagine giving up a safe job just to do this one.
そ、それは……話すと長いというか<br>山よりも高く海よりも深い事情があるという:
W-well, boss, that's... it's a long story, or rather, there are
circumstances deeper than the ocean and higher than the mountains...
そ、そんなことより！<br>ほら。鑑定が終わったぞ！: W-well, forget that! Look, boss, the appraisal is finished!
お前が持ち込んだ武器の価値はこんなものだ。<br>贔屓目なしで鑑定したが、かなり:
This is the value of the weapons you brought. I appraised them
without any favoritism, and it's a pretty good price, isn't it?
どれどれ……ふうん、手際もいいし、<br>査定に書かれた裏付けも、しっかりとして:
Let's see... hmm, Elmia, you've done a good job. The reasoning in the
appraisal is solid.
いい鑑定士じゃないか。<br>ウチにも欲しいぐらいだ。: Not a bad appraiser. I almost want to hire her for my place.
だが……さすがに安すぎないか？<br>今回は、俺おススメの逸品があったはずだ。:
But... isn't this too cheap? There should have been a masterpiece I
recommended this time.
逸品？ そんなものあったかな……: Masterpiece? I don't recall anything like that.
その名も『星々の輝きを模した、まるで宇宙を切り裂くかのような<br>銀河の煌きで:
It's called the 'Cosmic Edge Infinite Blade'—a holy sword imitating
star radiance, cutting through the universe like a galaxy!
初めて聞く名の剣だ……: That's the first I've heard of a sword by that name.
それはそうだろう。俺が名付けたんだからな。: Well, of course. I named it myself.
『模した』とか『まるで』とか『ような』とか、まったく具体性のない<br>刀号だが:
'Imitates,' 'as if,' 'like'... That's a completely vague sword name, isn't
it?
あまりにも美しい剣だったからそう名付けたんだ。<br>相当な価値のある名剣に違い:
I named it that because it's such a beautiful sword, definitely a
valuable masterpiece.
しかし……それほど美しい剣なんて、見かけなかったが？: But... I didn't see any sword that beautiful.
ふ、2人とも！ あそこ！: Hey, both of you! Over there!
馬鹿な奴らだぜ！ 武器を盗まれても<br>全く気づかねえとはな！:
What a bunch of idiots! They didn't even notice their weapons being
stolen!
こいつは俺が責任をもって金に換えといてやる！: I'll take care of turning this into cash!
あー！ 俺の『星々の輝きを模した、まるで宇宙を切り裂くかのような<br>銀河の煌:
Ah! My 'Cosmic Edge Infinite Blade'—the holy sword imitating star
radiance, cutting through the universe like a galaxy!
お前が話しかけてくるから、気が散ったんだ！: Because you kept talking to me, I got distracted!
くそ、間違いなく、高値で売れる剣なのに！: Damn it! That sword could've sold for a high price!
災難だな。同情してやる。: Tough break. I feel for you.
エルミアも用心棒としての仕事を全うできていないから<br>減給だよ。:
Elmia, since you haven't been doing your job as a bodyguard, I'm
cutting your pay.
前言撤回！ 何としてでも盗難品を取り戻すぞ！: I take it back! We're recovering those stolen goods no matter what!
コソ泥め！ 待ちやがれーっ！: You damn thief! Hold it right there!
<user>だ！ <user>さんでも、<br><user>様でも、司令官と呼ん: It's ! You can call me Mr. , Lord , or Commander.
私はお前の部下じゃない。<br><user>と呼ばせてもらう。: I'm not your subordinate. I'll call you .
うーん、子どもに呼び捨てにされるのはなぁ……: Hmm, having a kid call me just by my name... that's a bit...
今、私のどこを見て子ども呼ばわりした！？<br>私の胸が薄いのは生まれつきだ！:
What about me makes you think I'm a child? I was born with a flat
chest!
これでも二百歳は越えている！<br>お前よりも年上だぞ！？: I'm over 200 years old, you know! I'm older than you!
くっ……どうしてこうも子ども扱いされる……！？<br>身長と胸が大きければ偉いの:
Tch... why am I always treated like a child! Are height and breast size
all that matter!
おい。急がないとあの盗賊たちを見失ってしまうぞ。: Hey. If we don't get a move on, we'll lose those thieves.
